calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-01-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DUPLICATE ENTRY.

Amended Osc Of Name Change Without Requirement Of Publication.
Off Calendar Aug-01-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Wendy Pun.
Petitioner: Minerta Levoula Garcia, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Levaula Vailoa Leavasa, was sworn and examined.
No appearance by the Co-Petitioner/Minor's Father: Malaefatu Leavasa, which notice was dispensed by order of the Court on July 27, 2006.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted. THE NEW NAME OF MINOR IS LEVAULA VAILOA LEVAOLA.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-27-2006 Reset To Aug-01-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minors.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Jacqueline Chan.
Petitioner: Minereta Levaula Garcia, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Levaula Vailoa Leavasa.
Lacks the Minor's Father consent or proof of service on notice, the OSC for Change of Name of a Minor is continued to Aug. 1, 2006 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
Petitioner to file a Declaration with an Application for an Order Dispensing with Notice.
